title: NATIONAL WEATHER SERVICE - 211info
text: NATIONAL WEATHER SERVICE NATIONAL WEATHER SERVICE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information about regional weather conditions and forecasts, climate data, and river level information. Issues watches and warnings for adverse weather conditions. 1325 East West Highway Silver Spring, MD 20910 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: No standard hours Email (541) 276-7832 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 261-9246 Main phone Main phone (541) 276-7832 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Nationwide Services: Cold Weather Advisories Drought Advisories Extreme Heat Advisories/Warnings Flood Advisories Freeze Warnings High Tide Advisories High Wind Advisories Hurricane Advisories Small Craft Warnings Stock/Crop Advisories Thunderstorm Advisories Tornado Advisories Weather Reports Winter Storm Advisories If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. NATIONAL WEATHER SERVICE
